positive: A stylized, minimalist woodland animal scene featuring a graceful leaping fawn amidst stylized fern leaves and delicate wildflower clusters. The design must be highly symmetrical, with the fawn centered in a dynamic, yet balanced pose. Use a limited color palette of deep forest greens, earthy terracotta, and creamy ivory, emphasizing strong, clean outlines and silhouette style for a modern graphic print. The composition should allow for full scaling on clothing, with ample negative space around the main subject. Perfect for vector art aesthetic, high contrast ink printing style. Golden hour dappling light accentuating the foliage edges.
